title: New York-based AI infrastructure startup Jedify raised ... - Instagram
search_path_label: A 级媒体 / GDELT 路径
full_text:
tradedvc on June 10, 2026: "New York-based AI infrastructure startup Jedify raised $24M in a Series A led by Norwest, with participation from S Capital VC, Cerca Partners, Oceans Ventures, and strategic backing from Snowflake. The company builds a “context graph” layer that connects enterprise systems—databases, SaaS tools, and unstructured data—to give AI agents business-specific context around permissions, terminology, and workflows so they can operate more effectively inside companies. Co-founder and CEO Assaf Henkin said customers are already using the platform to unify disparate systems and surface real-time, task-specific insights for teams like sales and account management.
FOUNDERS: Assaf Henkin, Adi Elimelech & Erik Shani
INVESTORS: Norwest, S Capital VC, Cerca Partners, Oceans Ventures & Snowflake
ROUND: Series A
AMOUNT: $24,000,000
HQ: New York
#VentureCapital #Jedify #AssafHenkin #AdiElimelech #ErikShani TradedV".
